category_sources: Official GitHub README describes easy-rsa as a utility for creating root CAs, certificate requests, certificates, intermediate CAs, and CRLs.
source_facts.description says it is a CLI utility to build and manage a PKI CA.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README and project name use Easy-RSA/easy-rsa.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README points users to README.quickstart.md and the doc/ directory for 3.x documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplied as https://github.com/OpenVPN/easy-rsa; repo enrichment skipped per instruction.
tags_sources: Official README describes certificate authority, certificate request, certificate signing, intermediate CA, and CRL workflows.
source_facts.description identifies CLI, PKI, and CA management.
